items.title: Lucid Motors’ CFO is out as its new CEO continues leadership shakeup
items.summary: The company announced a new slate of executive hires meant to help turn things around, as Gravity SUV sales are not taking off as expected.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Onimusha: Way of the Sword's release date has been pushed up to avoid the pre-GTA 6 scramble
items.summary: Capcom is trying to get Onimusha: Way of the Sword out the door before the fall release calendar gets really crowded.
